name: interface-design
description: Codex-first interface design skills for product UIs, dashboards, admin panels, tools, and design-system memory.

interface.shortDescription: Craft product interfaces with intent, memory, and consistency.
interface.longDescription: A Codex-first design engineering plugin for dashboards, admin panels, SaaS apps, tools, settings pages, and data interfaces. It guides Codex to establish product-specific design intent, reuse .interface-design/system.md decisions, audit drift, extract patterns, and critique generic UI before delivery.
defaultPrompt: Use Interface Design to build a dashboard with a product-specific visual system.
Use Interface Design to audit this UI against .interface-design/system.md.
Use Interface Design to extract a design system from the existing frontend.
